org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.about

Class AboutDialog

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.app.Dialog
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.about.AboutDialog
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.DialogInterface, android.view.KeyEvent.Callback, android.view.View.OnCreateContextMenuListener, android.view.Window.Callback

    public class AboutDialog
extends android.app.Dialog
    Dialog that is displaying a "about this app" message.
    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$

    $GroupId$

    • Constructor Detail

      • AboutDialog

        public AboutDialog(android.content.Context context)
        Create the "About" dialog with the default configuration. The description of the application is read for the asset file "info.html" (HTML format). The legal text is read from the asset file "legal.html" (HTML format).
        Parameters:
        context -
        See Also:
        AboutDialog(Context, int, String, String)

      • AboutDialog

        public AboutDialog(android.content.Context context,
           int applicationIcon,
           String infoAsset,
           String legalAsset)
        Create the "About" dialog with the default configuration.
        Parameters:
        context -
        applicationIcon - is the identifier of the application icon.
        infoAsset - is the name of the asset file that is a HTML file with the description of the application. By default it is "info.html".
        legalAsset - is the name of the asset file that is a HTML file with the legal text to display in the dialog box. By default it is "legal.html".

    • Method Detail

      • onCreate

        public void onCreate(android.os.Bundle savedInstanceState)
        Overrides:
        onCreate in class android.app.Dialog
